name_en: 💕With full original retail packaging💕【New】The GG Emblem collection reinterprets the brand's iconic pattern with creative design and innovative functions, crafted as a collectible for years to come. This beige and white shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from the new GG monogram fabric. Finished with light pink leather trim and Gucci embossed logo.
name_cn:
💕With full original retail packaging💕【New】The GG Emblem collection reinterprets the brand's iconic pattern with creative design and innovative functions, crafted as a collectible for years to come. This beige and white shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from the new GG monogram fabric. Finished with light pink leather trim and Gucci embossed logo.
Light pink and light pink new GG monogram coated fabric
Light pink leather trim
Webbing taffeta lining
Gucci embossed
Includes D-ring for hanging removable items
Contrasting stitching
Interior: 1 zip pocket, multiple card slots with flat pockets
Adjustable shoulder strap (52cm)
Snap closure
Color: 820688.
Dimensions: 20cm (W) x 12.5cm (H) x 5cm (D)
Weight: approx. 323g
Color: Light pink pvc/Original leather.
Made in Italy
